allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$(cat <<''EOF''
feat(phase-01): initialize Next.js 15 project with multilingual support

Phase 01: Project Setup - Complete

Implemented:
- Next.js 15 App Router with TypeScript strict mode
- Tailwind CSS with talentsCARE brand theme (green #0B5345, teal, gold)
- Static export configuration for GitHub Pages deployment
- Project structure (app/, components/, lib/, messages/, public/)
- Base layout with Inter + Montserrat fonts
- ESLint + Prettier configuration
- Dependencies: next-intl, framer-motion, react-hook-form, zod

Tests: 6/6 PASSED
- Build successful (2.3s, static HTML in /out)
- TypeScript: 0 errors
- ESLint: 0 warnings
- Tailwind rendering verified

Code Review: Grade A- (0 critical issues)

Documentation:
- Complete project setup guide
- System architecture
- Code standards
- Deployment guide

Ready for Phase 02: i18n Infrastructure
EOF
)")

Bash(git commit -m "$(cat <<''EOF''
feat(phase-02): implement multilingual i18n infrastructure

Phase 02: i18n Infrastructure - Complete

Implemented:
- 3-language support: German (DE), English (EN), Vietnamese (VI)
- next-intl v4.9 integration with static export
- URL routing: /de/ (default), /en/, /vi/
- Locale configuration (config.ts, request.ts, navigation.ts)
- Middleware for automatic locale detection
- Multilingual layout with hreflang SEO tags
- Language switcher component with accessibility
- Translation files (de.json, en.json, vi.json)

Tests: 8/8 PASSED
- Build successful (10.1s, all locales generated)
- TypeScript: 0 errors
- ESLint: 0 warnings
- All 3 locale pages: /de/, /en/, /vi/
- Translations loading correctly
- hreflang tags verified
- No hydration errors

Code Review: Grade A- (0 critical issues)
- WCAG 2.1 AA accessibility compliant
- 102kB First Load JS, ~5KB i18n overhead
- SEO optimized with canonical URLs + alternates

Documentation:
- i18n implementation guide
- Translation workflow
- Updated codebase summary
- Updated system architecture

Ready for Phase 03: Content Translation
EOF
)")
